heading: Introduction
content: Welcome to our company! Our mission is to provide excellent service and a supportive environment for all employees.

heading: Leave Policy
content: Employees are entitled to 20 days of paid leave per year. Leave requests must be submitted through the HR portal.

heading: Work From Home
content: Work from home is allowed up to 2 days per week, subject to manager approval and team coordination.

heading: Code of Conduct
content: All employees are expected to maintain professional behavior, respect colleagues, and adhere to company guidelines.

heading: Health & Safety
content: The company ensures a safe working environment. Employees should report any safety concerns to HR immediately.

heading: IT & Security Policy
content: Employees must use company devices responsibly, follow password policies, and report any security incidents immediately.

heading: Benefits & Perks
content: Employees have access to health insurance, wellness programs, and other perks. Details are available in the HR portal.
